## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly pod stand-up to discuss updates, challenges, and improvements in content generation processes.](https://fathom.video/share/YdJp81yCfYsAdegns_3r3XxKEUNx4SsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Atlas (internal tool) performance issues identified; engineering team implementing fixes based on comprehensive feedback](https://fathom.video/share/YdJp81yCfYsAdegns_3r3XxKEUNx4SsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [New clients (Town, Engine, Aimbit) being onboarded with adjusted processes](https://fathom.video/share/YdJp81yCfYsAdegns_3r3XxKEUNx4SsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Cloud Projects outperforming Atlas in content generation; team adapting workflows](https://fathom.video/share/YdJp81yCfYsAdegns_3r3XxKEUNx4SsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Significant improvements to Atlas expected soon, including chat interface and better assignment direction handling](https://fathom.video/share/YdJp81yCfYsAdegns_3r3XxKEUNx4SsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)

## Topics

### Atlas Performance Issues and Improvements

  - [Darrell provided extensive feedback on Atlas's poor performance compared to Claude Projects](https://fathom.video/share/YdJp81yCfYsAdegns_3r3XxKEUNx4SsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Engineering team acknowledged issues; removing constraining elements to leverage Claude's improved capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/YdJp81yCfYsAdegns_3r3XxKEUNx4SsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [New chat interface being tested for more intuitive user experience](https://fathom.video/share/YdJp81yCfYsAdegns_3r3XxKEUNx4SsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Assignment direction feature now functional, honoring user input](https://fathom.video/share/YdJp81yCfYsAdegns_3r3XxKEUNx4SsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Keyword stuffing and hard-coded elements causing over-fluffed content; to be stripped out](https://fathom.video/share/YdJp81yCfYsAdegns_3r3XxKEUNx4SsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Ask.ai feature for outline generation in assignment direction coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/YdJp81yCfYsAdegns_3r3XxKEUNx4SsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)

### New Client Onboarding

  - [Town and Engine: Pausing at CM layer; Darrell acting as CM temporarily](https://fathom.video/share/YdJp81yCfYsAdegns_3r3XxKEUNx4SsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Aimbit: Full ramp-up approved; demanding but communicative client](https://fathom.video/share/YdJp81yCfYsAdegns_3r3XxKEUNx4SsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Specific product terminology important for Aimbit; team learning to adapt](https://fathom.video/share/YdJp81yCfYsAdegns_3r3XxKEUNx4SsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
